/usr/bin/c++ -g -O0 -g -Wl,-z,lazy -rdynamic CMakeFiles/gmock_module_tests.dir/tests/test_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gmock_module_tests.dir/tests/test_open.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gmock_module_tests.dir/tests/test_read_write.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gmock_module_tests.dir/tests/test_stat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gmock_module_tests.dir/tests/test_bypass.cpp.o -o gmock_module_tests  libgmock-module.a lib/libgtest.a lib/libgmock.a lib/libgtest.a -ldl
